---
name: Incident Simulation Issue
about: Report an issue with a specific simulation scenario
title: "[SIM] "
labels: simulation
assignees: ''
---

## Scenario
Name of the scenario: (e.g. `db-connection-pool`, `bad-deploy`)

## Service
(e.g. `payment-service`, `api-gateway`)

## Severity
SEV1 / SEV2 / SEV3

## Expected Behavior
What the simulation should produce.

## Actual Behavior
What it actually produces.

## Output Files
Attach relevant output files from the `generated/` directory:
- `postmortem.md`
- `timeline.md`
- `remediation.md`
- `llm-calls.jsonl`
